settings.custom_liquid:
Price Includes:
(All features)

1. 2x4 Fortified Wood Construction Made for Gyms Extra Strong, Heavy Users
2. Easy Slide Move Assembly™
3. Surround Heat with Ultra Hot FRONT HEATERS
4. Ultra full spectrum red light heaters
5. Tempered Glass Door
6. MEDICAL SAUNA'S HEAVY DUTY MILITARY - GRADE INDESTRUCTIBLE SEATS™
7. Hot Yoga Room
8. 10x Reinforced Commercial Grade Floors
9. Extra Long Ergonomic 31-Inch Tall Built-In Backrest
10. 31-Inch Chrome Easy Clean Handle w/Washable Cover
11. Soaring Sauna Ceilings
12. Heat resistant commercial speaker
13. Easy-clip Assembly
14. The World's First HEAT RESISTANT Android Certified Tablet
15. Backed by 48 Doctors, CHIROPRACTORS, PHYSICAL THERAPISTS, SURGEONS

settings.heading_r:
2x4 FORTIFIED WOOD
CONSTRUCTION
MADE FOR GYMS - EXTRA
STRONG, HEAVY USERS
settings.text_title_r: We didn't just make your bench indestructible, we made every wall indestructible. While many of our competitors use 1x2 wood everywhere because heat-resistant lumber is expensive, we didn't spare any expenses when it comes to your custom saunas. We will build your entire sauna out of 2x4 heat-resistant wood so you can have peace of mind knowing your sauna will never break.
Your sauna is designed to be easily slid into place. You can simply push the sauna into the location you desire.

settings.heading_r: SURROUND HEAT WITH ULTRA HOT FRONT HEATERS
settings.text_title_r:
Understanding what's inside a sauna is as easy as looking at it, just like looking at a car. If you see a car with three wheels, you know it has three wheels. Saunas work the same way; you just need to know what to look for.

Most saunas don't have front heaters. Why? Because achieving surround heat requires some serious engineering, and it can add $3,500 to manufacture a custom motherboard. However, if you order during our special offer, we'll include surround heat for FREE. This means heaters in the front, at the back, on the sides, and even on your legs-intense heat from every direction. Get ready to work up a serious sweat!

settings.heading_r: ULTRA FULL SPECTRUM RED LIGHT HEATERS
settings.text_title_r: Many saunas take an hour and a half to heat up. Even at gyms, they often pre-heat their saunas an hour and a half before you arrive. Waiting that long for a sauna session wastes a lot of precious time. That's why Medical Saunas invested so much time and resources to engineer the world's first Ultra Full Spectrum Red Light Heaters. These heaters make your medical sauna hot in just 15 minutes!.
Tempered glass emerges as the prime choice when prioritizing strength, thermal resilience, and safety as important factors.

settings.heading_r:
MEDICAL SAUNA'S HEAVY DUTY
MILITARY -
GRADE INDESTRUCTIBLE
SEATS™
settings.text_title_r: Unlike many saunas that use flimsy 1x2 wood for their benches, our saunas are constructed with sturdy 2x4 wood, stronger than many tables. We did this so you'll never have to worry about your sauna falling apart. Treat yourself to the strongest sauna ever made—an indestructible one

The floor is the first thing to get damaged in many saunas. That's why, instead of having wood every 10 inches, we've reinforced the floors and added heavy-duty wood every 1 inch. This means we use 10 times more heat-resistant wood, but it is worth it to avoid any issues.

settings.heading_r:
EXTRA LONG ERGONOMIC
31-INCH TALL BUILT-IN BACKREST
settings.text_title_r: Going beyond the usual 12-inch sauna backrests, we decided a spacious 31-inch,. Others may charge $500 for this feature, but we believe in providing a high level of comfort as a standard in our saunas.

settings.heading_r:
31-INCH CHROME EASY
CLEAN HANDLE W/WASHABLE COVER
settings.text_title_r: Cleaning saunas can be challenging, but not with ours. Our commercial-grade handles are designed for easy maintenance and, measuring at 31 inches, they outsize the typical 12-inch handles found in many sauna.
Unlike the standard 77-inch tall saunas offered by our competitors, our commercial models distinguish themselves with a height of 82 inches.They comfortably accommodate individuals up to 6'8".
Experience the difference with our heat-resistant speaker systems designed to transform every session into an oasis of meditative music.
A sauna is about relaxation and rejuvenation, not frustration. We upgraded our sauna construction with clasp together technology so you can have the most seamless of sauna assembly.

settings.heading_r:
Introducing, THE WORLD'S FIRST
HEAT RESISTANT
settings.text_title_r:
Android Tablet™

Bringing your phone into a hot sauna will cause it to shut off and get damaged in about 10 minutes. You won't gain much health benefits from a sauna session that short. That's why we've dedicated considerable time and resources to invent the world's first heat-resistant Android tablet. With our patent-pending Android tablet, you can download apps and stream Hulu, Netflix, and ESPN. Time will fly as you watch YouTube in the sauna. See how much better you feel after spending an hour in a sauna.

settings.heading_r:
BACKED BY 48 DOCTORS,
DOCTORS, CHIROPRACTORS,
PHYSICAL THERAPISTS,
SURGEONS
settings.text_title_r: Why settle for a regular sauna when you can get for a custom Medical Sauna backed by 48 doctors? We engineer your sauna in strict accordance with the guidelines provided by the doctors, chiropractors, physical therapists, nurses, and surgeons behind Medical Saunas™. Choose a custom sauna built by Medical Sauna to enjoy both full comfort and maximum medical benefits.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of custom 1™ features 1-14)

settings.text_title_r: While our competitors' saunas may cost as much as $1000 per month, our saunas boast our proprietary Extreme Energy-Efficient Heating System™. This system uses only 25% of the power compared to competitors, potentially reducing your electric bill to between $50 and $250 and ensuring significant savings. In the first year alone, you could save thousands of dollars by choosing our saunas..

Let's talk about something amazing: the practice of stretching your muscles in a heated room. It's not just a feel-good experience; it's medically beneficial for you. It's like turbocharging your workout, offering almost double the health benefits.

Now, here's where we stand out from the competition. While our competitors are stuck with old designs, including benches that you can't budge an inch, and even if you manage to remove them, there are no heaters on the ground. We've taken a different approach. We've designed benches that you can easily remove, and we've placed heaters on the ground and walls. What does that mean for you? It translates to having an open, heated space at your disposal, providing ample room for you to engage in all the stretches you desire. It's like your own personal hot yoga studio!

Adding LED lights to a sauna might seem easy, but it's crucial to do it right to ensure your sauna lasts for years, especially with all that heat. Many sauna companies build LED lights that fall or drip down over time. That's why we've securely fastened them under the backrest with sturdy screws, so they won't budge. We've also engineered them to withstand high temperatures, ensuring they last practically forever. Enjoy the best sauna design with a modern touch that's built to last!

Our Oxygen Ion Sanitation System™ works tirelessly to clear away dust, bacteria, pollen, and other allergens to make the air you breathe pure and safe, so you can relax and enjoy your sauna experience without any worries

In many saunas, slow heating systems hinder the recommended warm up and cool down rounds essential for hot/cold therapy's health benefits. Medical SaunaTM addresses this with our potent Rapid Internal Heating System™M enabling effective hot/cold therapy for enhanced muscle relaxation and flexibility

While other saunas claim to remove some toxins, our commericial line™ specializes in eliminating more harmful ones including heavy metals, phthalates, and other substances often found in daily life. Our Detox Routine enlarges skin pores to flush out these toxins to help you become healthier.

Poorly designed saunas often encounter unwanted temperature fluctuations, we've engineered a solution that works seamlessly with our advanced heating system maintaining your sauna at the perfect temperature with less effort while receiving the maximum performance

Unlike other sauna companies that rely on outdated CDs and audio jacks, we've embraced innovation to enhance your sauna experience. Our saunas feature Bluetooth technology, allowing you to effortlessly control the ambiance with a full set of relaxing spa music. We believe in offering you complete control over your relaxation journey, ensuring a seamless and modern spa experience.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of custom 2™ features 15-22)

settings.text_title_r: Many saunas provide even heat throughout, which can make it unbearable to stay in for an extended period of time. We've read several reviews from other companies that list complaints about overheating lower extremities. That's why we've introduced omnidirectional heat in our design, creating lower heat around your feet and higher heat around your back. This allows the heat to cycle around the sauna, giving you the optimal spa experience.

Mental health is crucial, as it can significantly influence one's day. That's why we've integrated chromatic light therapy into our saunas. Coupled with the medical features of our commericial line, this sauna not only offers healing benefits but also positively improves your mood.

settings.heading_r:
HEAT RESISTANT INTERIOR
READING LIGHTS™
settings.text_title_r: Going beyond the usual 12-inch sauna backrests, we decided a spacious 31-inch, Others may charge $500 for this feature, but we believe in providing a high level of comfort as a standard in our saunas.

settings.heading_r:
FIRST CLASS SEATING FOR
EXTRA COMFORT™
settings.text_title_r: Airplane seats, usually 15 inches wide, are known for being extremely uncomfortable, c and believe it or not, many sauna benches are also this size. To enhance comfort in your sauna, we've added seats that are 25% deeper which ensures that even if you have a customer who is big and tall, they can fit and relax comfortably.

settings.heading_r:
HEAT RESISTANT
INTERIOR READING LIGHTS™
settings.text_title_r: While reading lights are a common feature in saunas, they often aren't suited for commercial use. When used for eight hours a day, these lights tend to flicker and require frequent replacement due to their inability to handle the heat. In stark contrast, our commercial-grade, heat-resistant lights are designed to withstand both high temperatures and heavy use without any issues, providing a more reliable and convenient experience.

We've included Red Light Therapy in our commercial line, as it's rapidly gaining popularity within the medical community. Ideal for skin health, this cutting-edge therapy helps provide a multitude of benefits, such as reducing wrinkles and acne, enhancing energy and performance, accelerating recovery, boosting mental clarity, and so much more.

Many other sauna companies have decided what comfort means in a sauna, but we believe that standard was set too low for our customers. Therefore, we've expanded the interior space by an extra 25% in our saunas, ensuring that you can truly lounge comfort during your daily session.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of custom 3™ features 23-29)

settings.heading_r: ON/OFF SWITCH FOR EACH FULL SPECTRUM HEATER™
settings.text_title_r: Unlike other companies that keep their heaters on constantly, we added an on/off switch to every full spectrum heater so you can turn them off individually when not in use. This not only conserves energy but also offers greater control over the sauna experience.

To accommodate as many clients as possible, we've added stadium seating to allow double the number of customers. If relaxation is the goal, our stadium seating design allows two people to lay down and relax, or it can comfortably host eight people in the sauna at the same time.
To construct some of the world's strongest saunas, we've incorporated 4 hinges into models 488 and 489, ensuring you never have to worry about the doors breaking down.

settings.heading_r:
36 INCH WIDE DOOR
FOR EASY ACCESS™
settings.text_title_r: While many saunas come with standard 22-inch doors, we've raised the bar. Our saunas are designed with a generous 36-inch door for easy entry and exit.

settings.heading_r:
ENHANCED CLEAN AIR INFLOW &
OUTFLOW VENTILATION SYSTEM™
settings.text_title_r: Our sauna minimizes unwanted temperature fluctuations, allowing you to maintain the ideal temperature with less effort while also enhancing healing benefits

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of custom 4-5™ features 30-34)

settings.yt_content: Dr. Berg talks about saunas and using dry heat to improve your health.
Dr. Oz and Oprah in a Sauna
Dr. Mercola and Steve Benda Discuss Saunas
The Health Benefits of Far Infrared Saunas for Cancer

settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.name: Daniel B.,
settings.colcontent: Those reinforced floors? Feels like I'm walking on a premium deck.

settings.name: Isabella A.,
settings.colcontent: Usually when featues are promised there is some sor of lack I found, especially in the case of saunaThe multi directional ensures the perfect temperature throughout. No more hot or cold spots. Just perfect warmth!

settings.name: Jackson Z.,
settings.colcontent: Felt the warmth from all sides. It's like a warm hug

settings.name: Chloe Y.,
settings.colcontent: Breathing in feels so fresh and clean, I really love how constantly circuclated the air is as I suffer from chronic allergy issues that make thee sort of activities hard to do.

settings.name: Daniel X.,
settings.colcontent: The silent heating feature is golden. It's just me, the warmth, and my thoughts. Pure bliss.

settings.name: Zoe W.,
settings.colcontent: The chromatic lights are a mood booster. Felt so relaxed and uplifted after my session.

settings.name: Benjamin V.,
settings.colcontent: I've always been skeptical about red light, but after experiencing it in this sauna, I'm a believer. My skin feels rejuvenated!

settings.name: Evelyn U.,
settings.colcontent: The spacious interior is everything! Had a couple of friends over, and we all fit in comfortably.

settings.name: William T.,
settings.colcontent: That World's First HEAT RESISTANT Android Tablet? Genius! Watched a whole Netflix episode without any overheating issues.

settings.name: Stella S.,
settings.colcontent: The heat-resistant commercial speaker is great, worked without any glitches.

settings.name: Liam R.,
settings.colcontent: the high ceilings are a win for tall folks like me. No more ducking or feeling cramped.

settings.name: Grace Q.,
settings.colcontent: The easy clean handle with a washable cover is such a smart touch. Makes cleaning a breeze!

settings.name: Caleb P.,
settings.colcontent: The extra-long ergonomic backrest is a dream. No more adjusting or feeling cramped.

settings.name: Harper O.,
settings.colcontent: We got the cusomized one for my sister in law as a 50th birthday gift and now we are thinking of buying one as well for our own vacatin cabin, we love it.

settings.name: Matthew N.,
settings.colcontent: Did a hot yoga session inside the sauna. The space is just perfect for it.

settings.name: Amelia M.,
settings.colcontent: Wow, the INDESTRUCTIBLE seats are something else! Super comfy and feels like they'll last forever.

settings.name: Noah L.,
settings.colcontent: The heat encasing door adds a touch of elegance while ensuring safety. It's a thoughtful addition to the design.

settings.name: Olivia K.,
settings.colcontent: I actually really love. Not only do they offer therapeutic benefits, but they also enhance the overall sauna experience with the good heat.

settings.name: Ethan J.,
settings.colcontent: I'm impressed with the surrounding heat, especially the super hot FRONT HEATERS. It provides an even heat throughout the session.

settings.name: Emma I.,
settings.colcontent: It's evident that this sauna is designed for durability as well as comfort, and the custom features are amazing.

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
